name: io.github.kinqsradiollc/brainrouter
description: BrainRouter MCP server — the cognitive memory engine. Durable recall, capture, focus scenes, persona, contradictions, code-aware retrieval, and a cognitive graph as MCP tools for any MCP-speaking agent.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the LLM used by memory extraction/recall judging (or set BRAINROUTER_LLM_API_KEY).

environmentVariables.name: BRAINROUTER_LLM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Overrides OPENAI_API_KEY for the memory engine's LLM calls.

environmentVariables.name: BRAINROUTER_LLM_ENDPOINT
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI-compatible chat-completions endpoint (e.g. a local LM Studio / Ollama URL). Defaults to OpenAI.

environmentVariables.name: BRAINROUTER_LLM_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model id for the memory engine's LLM calls (default gpt-4o-mini).
